_WARNING: COUNTERINTUITIVE CODING. For all 43 coded fishing+marine-activity columns: 0 = ALLOWED, 1 = PROHIBITED, 2 = RESTRICTED, 3 = N/A or UNKNOWN, null = NOT-YET-CODED (treat as N/A). 1 MEANS PROHIBITED. A truthy test (`if (props.anchoring)`) is a SAFETY BUG. Every coded column MUST pass through levelOf(). Golden test asserts levelOf(1)==='prohibited'.
levelReadRule: out = (key in props) ? levelOf(props[key]) : 'na'  // read by KEY with null-coalescing on VALUE; NEVER branch on key existence (all 90 keys always present; V1/V2 differences are null VALUES, not missing keys).

coarseActivities.fishing: moreRestrictive over ALL 25 fishing columns (order: prohibited>restricted>allowed>unknown>na)

coarseNotes.diving: RECREATIONAL SCUBA/freedive. Do NOT merge with underwater_extraction_diving (that is EXTRACTIVE fishing, a fishing column).
coarseNotes.removalOfArtifacts: removal_of_historic_artifacts is ARTIFACTS/FOSSILS, NOT marine life. Marine-life removal is captured by the fishing rollup.
coarseNotes.dredging: V1 uses dredging, V2 uses dredging_dumping; coalesce to the more-restrictive so V1/V2 polygons for the same rule agree.
coarseNotes.fishingArtisanal: artisanal_fishing + subsistence_fishing are both V2-only small-scale; folded to avoid a 4th fishing member.
coarseNotes.fishing: single 'is fishing limited here' signal for geofencing; per-gear detail stays in raw.restrictions.

special.tribal: tribalExemption: 0->true, 1->false, null->null. BOOLEAN (inverted vs activities). NEVER a Level.
special.speed: REDUCED scheme: Prohibited i.e. no transit (1); Restricted (2); N/A or Unknown (3); Not-Yet-Coded (null). NO 0/allowed value. Use the same levelOf() (0 never occurs).
special.lfp: integer 0..5 Level-of-Fishing-Protection indicator; protection strength, NOT a Level enum.
special.wdpaId: String(v); if result is '0' or '' or v is 0/null -> null (absent). Keep composite verbatim ('555542441; 555637321', '102534_B'). NEVER Number()-parse (type-unstable).
special.iucnCat: passthrough; 'Unassigned' -> null. May be composite ('Unassigned; VI').

identity.name: site_name
identity.categoryId: derived 1..11 via Area Categories label table; 'unknown' on label drift

rawPassthrough: raw.restrictions = { <each of the 43 coded columns>: levelOf(value) }  // lossless

exclude.note: LOCKED defaults. category 9 = EEZ/jurisdictional (538 feat / 205M km2), not a restriction. HighSeas partition = RFMO/basin overlays (704 feat / 1.18B km2). maxAreaKm2WithoutHardBan: drop any polygon with marine_area > 50000 km2 UNLESS entry===1 or anchoring===1 (i.e. a hard transit ban) -- catches ocean-basin FMA/Other giants regardless of category label while protecting every genuinely-prohibited zone. KEEP inland-water (siteLocations empty by choice -- small, low-harm, carries real restrictions). Filtered (not deleted); per-reason counts recorded in manifest. Configurable via pipeline.config.json (data repo) and plugin config (excludeCategories).

geometry.antimeridian: RFC 7946 split; NO single ring crosses +/-180. EXPLODE MultiPolygon -> component polygons; index PER-COMPONENT bbox with parent back-ref; NEVER per-feature bbox.

citations: Zetterlind, V. et al. (2025). Navigator - a global database of verified marine protected and managed area regulations and boundaries. Scientific Data, 12, 1212. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41597-025-05535-2
The ProtectedSeas Navigator Map of Conservation Regulations, ProtectedSeas®, https://map.navigatormap.org (last visited [date]).
